
# Nyaya Sahayak Institutional AI Protocol

Nyaya Sahayak is a premium AI-driven legal intelligence platform designed for the Indian judicial system. 

## Core Capabilities
- **Forensic Case Auditor**: AI-driven analysis of legal narratives to identify relevant laws and sections.
- **Document Intelligence**: Clause-by-clause risk assessment and statutory auditing.
- **Procedural Roadmaps**: Step-by-step guidance for police and court interactions.
- **Document Generator**: Automated drafting of legal notices, FIR applications, and bonds.
- **Case Tracking**: Real-time monitoring of eCourts registry data.

## Official Domain
https://nyayasahayak.in

## Institutional Purpose
Empowering citizens with precision legal tools and connecting them with verified legal professionals.
